privileged_info_summary: The task docker_compose_external_bridge@1 uses synthetic data created during setup. All metadata claims are verified: the project root is /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects; the two external networks are named infra-db-net and infra-cache-net; the three services are shared-postgres (container name), shared-redis (container name), and flask-api (container name) running on port 5050; the Flask app uses flask 3.0.0, psycopg2-binary 2.9.9, and redis 5.0.1; Docker images are postgres:16-alpine, redis:7-alpine, and python:3.11-slim (all from official Docker Hub repositories); PostgreSQL is initialized with user appuser, password apppass123, and database appdb; the connectivity report is expected at /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/connectivity-report.txt.
